content.json:
# 💸 Copilot FinOps — per-developer usage & cost
Per-developer cost & usage for **GitHub Copilot → private Foundry** via the APIM gateway. Figures are **token × price** estimates (cached input discounted) — adjust the **Price table** below to your rates.

parameters.name: Models
parameters.label: Models
parameters.query:
customMetrics
| where name=='Total Tokens'
| extend model=tostring(customDimensions.model)
| where isnotempty(model)
| distinct model

parameters.name: PricesJson
parameters.label: Price table (USD per 1M tokens, edit to your rates)

content.query:
let prices=todynamic('{PricesJson}');
let P=(print p=prices|mv-expand p|project model=tostring(p['model']),inP=todouble(p['inP']),outP=todouble(p['outP']),cachedP=todouble(p['cachedP']));
let base=customMetrics
|where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens','Total Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens')
|extend oid=tostring(customDimensions.oid),model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize val=sum(valueSum),cnt=sum(valueCount) by oid,dev,model,name
|summarize prompt=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Tokens'),completion=sumif(val,name=='Completion Tokens'),tokens=sumif(val,name=='Total Tokens'),cached=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Cached Tokens'),reqs=tolong(sumif(cnt,name=='Total Tokens')) by oid,dev,model
|lookup P on model
|extend inP=coalesce(inP,1.0),outP=coalesce(outP,4.0),cachedP=coalesce(cachedP,0.25)
|extend cost=((prompt-cached)*inP+cached*cachedP+completion*outP)/1e6, savings=(cached*(inP-cachedP))/1e6;
let perDev=base|summarize cost=sum(cost),tokens=sum(tokens),reqs=sum(reqs) by oid,dev;
let T=perDev|summarize cost=sum(cost),tokens=sum(tokens),reqs=sum(reqs),devs=dcount(oid);
union
(T|project ord=1,Metric='💰 Total spend',Value=strcat('$',tostring(round(cost,2)))),
(T|project ord=2,Metric='🔢 Tokens (M)',Value=tostring(round(tokens/1e6,1))),
(T|project ord=3,Metric='📨 Requests',Value=tostring(reqs)),
(T|project ord=4,Metric='🧑‍💻 Active developers',Value=tostring(devs)),
(T|project ord=5,Metric='📊 Avg $/developer',Value=strcat('$',tostring(round(cost/devs,2)))),
(T|project ord=6,Metric='⚙️ $ per 1k tokens',Value=strcat('$',tostring(round(cost/(tokens/1000.0),4))))
|order by ord asc|project Metric,Value

content.json:
## 🏆 Usage concentration — who drives the spend
The **Pareto curve** plots cumulative spend against developers ranked by spend. A straight 45° line would mean everyone spends equally; the more it bows toward the top-left, the more a few developers dominate.

content.query:
let prices=todynamic('{PricesJson}');
let P=(print p=prices|mv-expand p|project model=tostring(p['model']),inP=todouble(p['inP']),outP=todouble(p['outP']),cachedP=todouble(p['cachedP']));
let base=customMetrics
|where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens','Total Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens')
|extend oid=tostring(customDimensions.oid),model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize val=sum(valueSum),cnt=sum(valueCount) by oid,dev,model,name
|summarize prompt=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Tokens'),completion=sumif(val,name=='Completion Tokens'),tokens=sumif(val,name=='Total Tokens'),cached=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Cached Tokens'),reqs=tolong(sumif(cnt,name=='Total Tokens')) by oid,dev,model
|lookup P on model
|extend inP=coalesce(inP,1.0),outP=coalesce(outP,4.0),cachedP=coalesce(cachedP,0.25)
|extend cost=((prompt-cached)*inP+cached*cachedP+completion*outP)/1e6, savings=(cached*(inP-cachedP))/1e6;
let perDev=base|summarize cost=sum(cost) by oid,dev;
let tot=toscalar(perDev|summarize sum(cost));let n=toscalar(perDev|count);
let R=perDev|order by cost desc|extend rank=row_number(),cum=row_cumsum(cost)|extend cumPct=100.0*cum/tot,devPct=100.0*rank/n;
union
(R|summarize v=round(maxif(cumPct,rank<=5),1)|project ord=1,Metric='Top 5 developers drive',Value=strcat(tostring(v),'%')),
(R|summarize v=round(maxif(cumPct,devPct<=10),1)|project ord=2,Metric='Top 10% of devs drive',Value=strcat(tostring(v),'%')),
(R|summarize v=round(maxif(cumPct,devPct<=20),1)|project ord=3,Metric='Top 20% of devs drive',Value=strcat(tostring(v),'%')),
(R|summarize v=round(100.0-maxif(cumPct,devPct<=50),1)|project ord=4,Metric='Bottom 50% of devs drive',Value=strcat(tostring(v),'%'))
|order by ord asc|project Metric,Value

content.title: Cumulative % of spend vs developer percentile (Pareto)
Top developers by spend
Developers by spend rate ($/day per developer)

content.json:
## 🧠 Model mix & efficiency
`model-router` requests appear under the **underlying model the router served** (e.g. grok-4-1-fast-reasoning, gpt-5.4-mini) — that's the model that actually billed. `$ / 1k tokens` is blended cost ÷ tokens per model.

content.query:
let prices=todynamic('{PricesJson}');
let P=(print p=prices|mv-expand p|project model=tostring(p['model']),inP=todouble(p['inP']),outP=todouble(p['outP']),cachedP=todouble(p['cachedP']));
let base=customMetrics
|where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens','Total Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens')
|extend oid=tostring(customDimensions.oid),model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize val=sum(valueSum),cnt=sum(valueCount) by oid,dev,model,name
|summarize prompt=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Tokens'),completion=sumif(val,name=='Completion Tokens'),tokens=sumif(val,name=='Total Tokens'),cached=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Cached Tokens'),reqs=tolong(sumif(cnt,name=='Total Tokens')) by oid,dev,model
|lookup P on model
|extend inP=coalesce(inP,1.0),outP=coalesce(outP,4.0),cachedP=coalesce(cachedP,0.25)
|extend cost=((prompt-cached)*inP+cached*cachedP+completion*outP)/1e6, savings=(cached*(inP-cachedP))/1e6;
base|summarize cost=sum(cost),tokens=sum(tokens),reqs=sum(reqs) by model
|project Model=model,['Cost (USD)']=round(cost,2),['Tokens (M)']=round(tokens/1e6,2),['Avg tokens/req']=round(tokens/reqs,0),['$ / 1k tokens']=round(cost/(tokens/1000.0),4)
|order by ['Cost (USD)'] desc
content.title: Cost & efficiency by model

content.query:
let prices=todynamic('{PricesJson}');
let P=(print p=prices|mv-expand p|project model=tostring(p['model']),inP=todouble(p['inP']),outP=todouble(p['outP']),cachedP=todouble(p['cachedP']));
let base=customMetrics
|where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens','Total Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens')
|extend oid=tostring(customDimensions.oid),model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize val=sum(valueSum),cnt=sum(valueCount) by oid,dev,model,name
|summarize prompt=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Tokens'),completion=sumif(val,name=='Completion Tokens'),tokens=sumif(val,name=='Total Tokens'),cached=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Cached Tokens'),reqs=tolong(sumif(cnt,name=='Total Tokens')) by oid,dev,model
|lookup P on model
|extend inP=coalesce(inP,1.0),outP=coalesce(outP,4.0),cachedP=coalesce(cachedP,0.25)
|extend cost=((prompt-cached)*inP+cached*cachedP+completion*outP)/1e6, savings=(cached*(inP-cachedP))/1e6;
base|summarize ['Cost (USD)']=round(sum(cost),2) by Model=model|order by ['Cost (USD)'] desc
content.title: Spend share by model

content.query:
let prices=todynamic('{PricesJson}');
let P=(print p=prices|mv-expand p|project model=tostring(p['model']),inP=todouble(p['inP']),outP=todouble(p['outP']),cachedP=todouble(p['cachedP']));
let base=customMetrics
|where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens','Total Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens')
|extend oid=tostring(customDimensions.oid),model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize val=sum(valueSum),cnt=sum(valueCount) by oid,dev,model,name
|summarize prompt=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Tokens'),completion=sumif(val,name=='Completion Tokens'),tokens=sumif(val,name=='Total Tokens'),cached=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Cached Tokens'),reqs=tolong(sumif(cnt,name=='Total Tokens')) by oid,dev,model
|lookup P on model
|extend inP=coalesce(inP,1.0),outP=coalesce(outP,4.0),cachedP=coalesce(cachedP,0.25)
|extend cost=((prompt-cached)*inP+cached*cachedP+completion*outP)/1e6, savings=(cached*(inP-cachedP))/1e6;
let g='{Gran}';
let span=toscalar(customMetrics|where name=='Total Tokens'|summarize x=max(timestamp)-min(timestamp)|project x);
let gstep=case(g=='5m',5m, g=='1h',1h, g=='1d',1d, case(span>14d,1d, span>2d,1h, 5m));
base|join kind=inner (customMetrics
|where name=='Total Tokens'|extend oid=tostring(customDimensions.oid),model=tostring(customDimensions.model)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize tt=sum(valueSum) by oid,model,bin(timestamp,gstep)) on oid,model
|extend costSlice=cost*(tt/tokens)
|summarize ['Spend (USD)']=round(sum(costSlice),2) by timestamp,model
|order by timestamp asc
content.title: Spend by model over time — each point = one {Gran:label} bucket

content.json:
### 🔀 Live routing — real gateway traffic
The **only real** routed-model attribution: APIM's *GatewayLlmLogs* diagnostic records the model the router actually served (**Served model**) vs the requested deployment. The synthetic seeder can't write here, so this reflects **genuine** gateway calls only — sparse until real Copilot traffic flows. (Charts above blend real + synthetic.)

content.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLlmLog
|summarize Requests=count(), Tokens=sum(TotalTokens) by ['Requested']=DeploymentName, ['Served model']=ModelName
|order by Requests desc
content.title: Routed model by requested deployment (real traffic · GatewayLlmLogs)

content.json:
## 🗓️ Usage timing (day × time-of-day, CEST)
Request intensity (% of the busiest cell) by day-of-week and 3-hour window — **darker = busier**. Shows work-hours / weekday concentration (fills out as more history accrues).

content.query:
let peak=toscalar(customMetrics|where name=='Total Tokens'|extend lt=timestamp+2h
|extend dw=toint(dayofweek(lt)/1d),hr=hourofday(lt),model=tostring(customDimensions.model)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})|extend ws=(hr/3)*3|summarize r=sum(valueCount) by dw,ws|summarize m=max(r));
customMetrics|where name=='Total Tokens'
|extend lt=timestamp+2h|extend dow=toint(dayofweek(lt)/1d),hour=hourofday(lt),model=tostring(customDimensions.model)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|extend ws=(hour/3)*3
|extend win=strcat(iff(ws<10,'0',''),tostring(ws),'-',iff(ws+3<10,'0',''),tostring(ws+3)),dayord=iff(dow==0,7,dow)
|summarize req=sum(valueCount) by win,dayord
|extend Intensity=toint(round(100.0*req/peak,0))
|evaluate pivot(dayord,sum(Intensity),win)|order by win asc
|project ['Time (CEST)']=win, Mon=column_ifexists('1',0), Tue=column_ifexists('2',0), Wed=column_ifexists('3',0), Thu=column_ifexists('4',0), Fri=column_ifexists('5',0), Sat=column_ifexists('6',0), Sun=column_ifexists('7',0)
content.title: Usage intensity by time-of-day × day (CEST)

content.json:
## 📐 Context window & caching
Context sizes per request, and how much is served from cache. Long-context agentic work reuses a stable prefix → higher cache-hit % (cost already discounts cached input).

content.query:
let pr=customMetrics
|where name=='Prompt Tokens'|where valueCount==1
|extend model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models});
pr|extend ord=case(valueSum<50000,1,valueSum<200000,2,valueSum<500000,3,4),band=case(valueSum<50000,'<50k',valueSum<200000,'50k-200k',valueSum<500000,'200k-500k','500k-1M')
|summarize Requests=count() by band,ord
|extend ['% of requests']=round(100.0*Requests/toscalar(pr|count),1)
|order by ord asc|project ['Context band']=band,Requests,['% of requests']
content.title: Share of requests by context size

content.query:
let pr=customMetrics
|where name=='Prompt Tokens'|where valueCount==1
|extend model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models});
pr|summarize avgCtx=avg(valueSum) by dev
|extend ord=case(avgCtx<50000,1,avgCtx<200000,2,avgCtx<500000,3,4),band=case(avgCtx<50000,'<50k',avgCtx<200000,'50k-200k',avgCtx<500000,'200k-500k','500k-1M')
|summarize Developers=count() by band,ord|order by ord asc|project ['Typical context (avg/request)']=band,Developers
content.title: Developers by typical context size

content.query:
let prices=todynamic('{PricesJson}');
let P=(print p=prices|mv-expand p|project model=tostring(p['model']),inP=todouble(p['inP']),outP=todouble(p['outP']),cachedP=todouble(p['cachedP']));
let base=customMetrics
|where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens','Total Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens')
|extend oid=tostring(customDimensions.oid),model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize val=sum(valueSum),cnt=sum(valueCount) by oid,dev,model,name
|summarize prompt=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Tokens'),completion=sumif(val,name=='Completion Tokens'),tokens=sumif(val,name=='Total Tokens'),cached=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Cached Tokens'),reqs=tolong(sumif(cnt,name=='Total Tokens')) by oid,dev,model
|lookup P on model
|extend inP=coalesce(inP,1.0),outP=coalesce(outP,4.0),cachedP=coalesce(cachedP,0.25)
|extend cost=((prompt-cached)*inP+cached*cachedP+completion*outP)/1e6, savings=(cached*(inP-cachedP))/1e6;
let T=base|summarize prompt=sum(prompt),cached=sum(cached),savings=sum(savings),cost=sum(cost);
union
(T|project ord=1,Metric='⚡ Cache-hit rate',Value=strcat(tostring(round(100.0*cached/prompt,1)),'%')),
(T|project ord=2,Metric='💵 Saved by caching',Value=strcat('$',tostring(round(savings,2)))),
(T|project ord=3,Metric='🧮 Cached input (M tokens)',Value=tostring(round(cached/1e6,1))),
(T|project ord=4,Metric='📉 Cost without caching',Value=strcat('$',tostring(round(cost+savings,2))))
|order by ord asc|project Metric,Value

let prc=customMetrics
|where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens')|where valueCount==1
|extend model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models});
prc|summarize prompt=sumif(valueSum,name=='Prompt Tokens'),cached=sumif(valueSum,name=='Prompt Cached Tokens'),avgCtx=avgif(valueSum,name=='Prompt Tokens') by dev
|extend ord=case(avgCtx<50000,1,avgCtx<200000,2,avgCtx<500000,3,4),band=case(avgCtx<50000,'<50k',avgCtx<200000,'50k-200k',avgCtx<500000,'200k-500k','500k-1M')
|summarize promptT=sum(prompt),cachedT=sum(cached),Developers=count() by band,ord
|extend ['Cache-hit %']=round(100.0*cachedT/promptT,1)
|order by ord asc|project ['Avg context band']=band,Developers,['Cache-hit %']
content.title: Cache-hit % by context band

content.json:
## 🛡️ Governance — rate-limit pressure
Developers whose peak burst approaches the **50k TPM** per-user limit. *Implied peak TPM = busiest 5-minute token sum ÷ 5* — a capacity signal derived from token bins (not from 429s, which carry no developer identity).

content.query:
let prices=todynamic('{PricesJson}');
let P=(print p=prices|mv-expand p|project model=tostring(p['model']),inP=todouble(p['inP']),outP=todouble(p['outP']),cachedP=todouble(p['cachedP']));
customMetrics|where name=='Total Tokens'
|extend dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName),model=tostring(customDimensions.model)
|where isnotempty(dev)|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize burst=sum(valueSum) by dev,bin(timestamp,5m)
|summarize peak5=tolong(max(burst)) by dev
|extend ['Implied peak TPM']=tolong(peak5/5),['% of 50k TPM limit']=round(100.0*(peak5/5)/50000.0,0)
|project Developer=dev,['Peak 5-min tokens']=peak5,['Implied peak TPM'],['% of 50k TPM limit']
|order by ['Peak 5-min tokens'] desc|take 12
content.title: Approaching the 50k TPM limit

parameters.name: Developer
parameters.label: Developer
parameters.query:
customMetrics
| where name=='Total Tokens'
| extend dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
| where isnotempty(dev)
| distinct dev
| order by dev asc

content.query:
let prices=todynamic('{PricesJson}');
let P=(print p=prices|mv-expand p|project model=tostring(p['model']),inP=todouble(p['inP']),outP=todouble(p['outP']),cachedP=todouble(p['cachedP']));
let base=customMetrics
|where name in ('Prompt Tokens','Completion Tokens','Total Tokens','Prompt Cached Tokens')
|extend oid=tostring(customDimensions.oid),model=tostring(customDimensions.model),dev=tostring(customDimensions.developerName)
|where isnotempty(dev)
|where '*' in ({Models}) or model in ({Models})
|summarize val=sum(valueSum),cnt=sum(valueCount) by oid,dev,model,name
|summarize prompt=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Tokens'),completion=sumif(val,name=='Completion Tokens'),tokens=sumif(val,name=='Total Tokens'),cached=sumif(val,name=='Prompt Cached Tokens'),reqs=tolong(sumif(cnt,name=='Total Tokens')) by oid,dev,model
|lookup P on model
|extend inP=coalesce(inP,1.0),outP=coalesce(outP,4.0),cachedP=coalesce(cachedP,0.25)
|extend cost=((prompt-cached)*inP+cached*cachedP+completion*outP)/1e6, savings=(cached*(inP-cachedP))/1e6;
base|where dev=='{Developer}'
|summarize ['Cost (USD)']=round(sum(cost),2),['Tokens (k)']=round(sum(tokens)/1000.0,0),Requests=sum(reqs) by Model=model
|order by ['Cost (USD)'] desc
content.title: Selected developer — by model
Selected developer — spend over time (per {Gran:label} bucket)

content.json:
## 📈 Budget & forecast
Monthly spend projected from the current run-rate vs an editable budget. *Projection = spend in window ÷ hours of data in window × 730 (avg hrs/month)* — shows “accruing…” until there are ≥3h of data, and sharpens as history accrues.
